action_set_definitions.name: get_summary_stats
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current status of the reconciliation, including the count of unmatched ledger entries, unmatched bank statements, and the number of entries in the discrepancy log.

action_set_definitions.name: get_tax_rate_schedule
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the official SUTA tax rate schedule for a specific period to identify rate changes and effective dates.

action_set_definitions.name: get_ledger_entries
action_set_definitions.description: Fetches internal ledger records for a specific account and period. Includes ID, date, amount, and current reconciliation status.

action_set_definitions.name: get_bank_statements
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves bank statement records for a specific period.

action_set_definitions.name: get_payroll_source_records
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves source payroll data including taxable wages per pay period to calculate expected tax liabilities.

action_set_definitions.name: match_entries
action_set_definitions.description: Links a ledger entry and a bank record as a standard match, updating status to reconciled.

action_set_definitions.name: create_ledger_entry
action_set_definitions.description: Manually adds a missing entry to the internal ledger to account for cash outflows found only in the bank statement.

action_set_definitions.name: resolve_ledger_entry
action_set_definitions.description: Updates a ledger entry to 'reconciled' status and simultaneously logs the variance in the discrepancy list with a required justification.

justification.description: Explanation of the variance (e.g., '2.1% used instead of 2.7%' or 'Cash outflow bypassed GL').

state_description.ledger_entries: List of internal accounting records including ID, date, amount, and reconciliation_status.
state_description.bank_statements: List of bank-provided records including ID, date, amount, and reconciliation_status.
state_description.reconciliation_log: A mapping of matched ledger IDs to bank IDs with timestamps.
state_description.discrepancies: List of entries flagged by the agent as requiring manual investigation.
state_description.summary_stats: Aggregated statistics of the current reconciliation state.

bank_statements.description: STATE DEPT OF REVENUE - TAX PAY
